text_block_list.text: I'm out shopping on a day off, when...

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Whaaat?! No way! You gotta wear something
sparklier than that!

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Tch. Who even cares what I look like?
choice_data_list: You two came out shopping together?

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Sigh... More like, she invited herself to my shopping trip.

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Oh, boo! It's not my fault you don't have any
party clothes!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
You're gonna get invited to a bunch of things
once you make your debut, right? Pre-race
parties, victory parties, the works!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Thinking of you going to all of those events in
your uniform is just, well unthinkable!
choice_data_list: I don't think it would be inappropriate...

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Agh, that's not the issue! ...I guess I've just got to
teach the both of you!

And just like that, I'm roped into going shopping
with them...

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Ooh! That dress is so beautiful! ♪ It's a nice
change of pace from your edgy signature
racewear!

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
I don't like it. If you tear up the hem a bit, I might
consider it though.

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Are you crazy?! The whole point is that it's cute!
You can't rip it up!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
How about this jumpsuit?! It has a short hem and
the legs are stylish. ♪

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Nope. The loud color drowns out everything else.

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
You've gotta be kidding! What's the point of
getting all dressed up if you're not even gonna
sparkle?!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Huff... Huff... Ugghh! We can't decide on anything!

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
There's no need to decide on anything in the first
place.

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: No way! After all this, we're definitely buying something! You'll see!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Come on! What kind of clothes are good? You can't hate everything!

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: I don't really care, but if I have to choose...

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Something easy to run in.

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Easy to run in?! This is supposed to be for parties!

If it's something easy to run in, then I can only
really think of...

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: A suit... Well, at least it wouldn't be too flashy.

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
I don't know if it'll sparkle or not... but let's go
check out the store.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
Hm... The fabric stretches well when I lift my legs.
This looks like it'd be easy to run in.

text_block_list.name: Clothing Shop Clerk
text_block_list.text: Oooh! Very tough! It suits you perfectly!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Yesss! You hear that?!

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
...I'm surprised. We actually found something
good.

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
I learned a lot too! Even clothes that are cool can
sparkle!
I'd say this shopping trip went pretty well!

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: A tracksuit... I see. I guess that's an option.

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Stoooppp! A tracksuit at a party?! I don't even
wanna imagine that!

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Thank you for the invitation.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Cheers.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: I don't see a problem at all.

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
You serious?! No, no, NO! Wearing your uniform
would be a hundred times better!

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
Geez... That's what I've been saying from the
start.

And so, our ridiculous shopping trip comes to a
close.
